imageHints.suggestedAspect: 4:3 or wider (crops to top 56% of canvas)
imageHints.suggestedSubject: portrait, lifestyle moment, or contextual environment
imageHints.treatment: photo fills upper zone, text panel sits below with dark background

useCases: Founder or executive quotes paired with a portrait photo
Client testimonial posts with a lifestyle photo of the client
Inspirational quote posts where the visual context matters
Team spotlight posts combining person photo with their quote
avoidCases: When no strong photo asset is available (use typographic-quote instead)
Quotes longer than 2–3 sentences — text panel becomes too crowded
When the quote needs extensive attribution context
